## Meeting Purpose

[To explain and demonstrate the process of creating a keyword research database for Airbyte using SEMrush data and Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Created an Airtable base with 18,500+ keywords from Airbyte's blog and data engineering resources](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Demonstrated how to link keywords to URLs, resulting in 728 unique pages for potential optimization](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Explained the use of rollup fields to calculate key metrics: keyword count, avg. difficulty, and total volume](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Discussed the importance of balancing SEO optimization with user experience, especially for documentation pages](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

## Topics

### SEMrush Data Export and Airtable Import

  - [Exported CSVs from SEMrush for specific subfolders (blog, data engineering resources)](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Imported CSVs into Airtable, mapping essential fields: keyword, URL, search volume, keyword difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Tip: When importing multiple CSVs, add an extra field to work around Airtable's URL mapping issue](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### Creating Linked Records for URL Analysis

  - [Used "Link to another record" feature to create a new table with unique URLs (728 total)](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [New table automatically maps all keywords to their respective URLs](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Provides a consolidated view of all keywords associated with each URL](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

### Calculating Key Metrics with Rollup Fields

  - [Added three crucial rollup fields for analysis:](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
    1.  Keyword Count: Counts total keywords per URL (e.g., some pages have 400+ keywords)
    2.  Average Keyword Difficulty: Calculates mean difficulty for all keywords on a page
    3.  Total Volume: Sums up search volume for all keywords on a page
  - [These metrics allow for prioritization of pages with high potential impact](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Prioritization and Refresh Strategy

  - [Sorted pages by total volume to identify high-potential targets](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Discussed the challenge of determining whether to refresh already well-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Suggested checking individual page performance and rankings to make informed decisions](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Considered adding sorts by difficulty and volume for more nuanced prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)

### SEO vs. User Experience Optimization

  - [Discussed the importance of optimizing documentation pages for user experience, not just SEO](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Highlighted how good documentation can impact customer retention and word-of-mouth referrals](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Suggested potentially focusing on both SEO and UX optimization for comprehensive improvement](https://fathom.video/share/bK4swS86NBskqFy7FU4Jybhx4pRhan9E?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)

## Next Steps

  - Send the Airtable to Marcel for review and confirmation of the approach
  - Consider adding traffic change data over time to help prioritize pages for refresh
  - Explore ways to identify pages that are already ranking well but could benefit from enhancements (e.g., internal linking, CTAs, FAQ sections)
  - Investigate Panzer's perspective on refreshing high-performing pages for SEO benefits
  - Share the meeting recording with George and other team members who might benefit from the walkthrough
